text.title: finops-cost-visibility Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for finops-cost-visibility as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Documenting a tagging standard without policy enforcement.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Teams follow documentation inconsistently under deadline pressure. Only policy enforcement at resource creation achieves 95%+ coverage needed for reliable reporting.

failure-mode.description: Tagging unattached or orphan resources weeks after creation by guessing owner from CloudTrail.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Original creators may have left; stale CloudTrail data misleads. Cross-reference HRIS or Backstage service catalog before assigning owner tags retroactively.
